list.tooltip:
Begin adventure with another character, can choose from other previously-saved player created characters.
Limit: can only select premade-character with same Origin as the current character.
Limit: selected character will not get his/her gift selection on this slot (cannot get a 3rd or more companion).
Later in-game there will be additional ways to introduce custom characters.

Start with a special stopwatch that could stop time at the cost of MP.
Limit: works best in areas with low mist pollution, using it in high-mist areas will render it useless for 3 days.
There are other ways to gain access to timestop beside this item.

Start with a gift card that stores 100 credit for any app purchase
Limit: its content can only be claimed if the holder has access to a cellphone.

Start with a Dominator, a firearm that requires MP to activate.
Can obliterate living target (leaving blood splatter) or paralyse them.
Limit: the gun decide whether the target should be killed. 
Limit: It may refuse to fire at a given target.
Start with an animal companion (select when creating new game).
